title: Implement wolfhsm SecretStore/WritableSecretStore
description: Use wolfhsm 0.1.0 crate (published) to implement NVM data-object access by label. SecretStore::get scans nvm_list+nvm_metadata for matching label then nvm_read. WritableSecretStore::put uses nvm_overwrite (existing) or nvm_add (new, find free ID). SigningBackend stays Unavailable -- wolfhsm crate has no EccP256Key::load_from_nvm(label) API yet. Transport config from URI ?server= or WOLFHSM_SERVER env var.
